_comment: Charset gate rules (data for scripts/check_charset.mjs). Each rule: a set of hex codepoint ranges [lo,hi] inclusive, plus a human reason. First match wins. Allow-list is implicit: anything not matched passes (font-reality-based).

rules.reason: Arabic (confusable with Hebrew; almost never intended)
Hebrew cantillation/te’amim (no glyph in Frank Ruhl → tofu)
bidi embedding/override control (use CSS unicode-bidi / <bdi> instead)
